review_title: We evaluated Keatext during a test period and were very impressed with the results.
author: Francis C.
pros: The Keatext interface is clear and easy to use. Keyword groupings and the display of sentiment measurement graphs are useful.
cons: None. We have not completed the product testing yet. A complementary offer for other data formats would be appreciated.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Definitely recommended if you’re interesting in analyzing text feedback and use it for decision-making.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I got a chance to use Keatext for a client and I loved it. There are so many ways you can use this tool to get better at marketing. The sky is the limit – literally. Since then, I have recommended this tool to several clients who were struggling to understand their customers and were interested in creating buyer personas. 1. Easy-to-use rather it is fun app that will make you love you work. 2. Great customer support. 3. Let’s you monitor customer sentiments, trends, and more across multiple channels.
cons: 1. They have blacklisted IPs of several countries which restricts potential clients from accessing their website. Not sure what’s the logic here but if it’s a global tool, everyone should be able to access website. 2. Third-party integration needs more work.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to import data and to analyze it, the learning curve is super fast as the software is well built and easy to learn. The team was also there for me if I had questions. I liked that I could be autonomous in a matter of hours.
cons: The analysis features were not exactly to my liking, and I felt the lexical analysis could use more statistical techniques for large datasets.

review_title: Perform better to your customers with Keatext
author: kerem T.
pros: Keatext is a very powerful tool. It has many functions while performing your customers better with efficient way. Especially comperative analysis helped me a lot.
cons: Nothing specific, but in this kind of softwares ,users may need additional how to guide videos or documents.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for some use cases, but not for my case
author: Sharon C.
pros: Power to analyze thousands of text data rows.
cons: Limitations are so clear. 1) Filter set renews every time I update the data even though the columns are the same in the same order. 2) Cumbersome to add any filters. It would be nice to drag and drop like in Excel pivot table or in Tableau. 3) Its AI is not able to read beyond typos. Making sure the thousands of rows of text data doesn't contain any typo is a burden for its users. 4) Noun = topic, adjective = sentiment -- too binary. What if users express the same idea by saying "reliability is great" and "reliable product"? Shouldn't it be considered the same? But Keatext doesn't know how to do that. 5) Unclear how retraining works. There were 1000 times I wanted to retrain the AI, but there wasn't enough guideline. 6) AI can't read between the lines. It's too single dimensional. Nuance won't be picked up by Keatext.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Does most of the work on its own, and easy to use
author: Sarwan B.
pros: I love the user interface and how easy it is to move between pages. and we can just keep clicking on the words to go deeper.
cons: the thesaurus function is a bit annoying. Sometimes even after we merge the words, they are still visible as separate words. It would be nice if a word cloud can be generated for the entire database

review_title: Easy, great support and collaboration by Keatext
author: Myshka S.
pros: The sentiment score it provides as well as the text categories such as problem, praise, suggestion, question.
cons: Because there is a limit of data depending on you pricing, when you upload a file by error (not right file, data not prepared before hand, etc.) and have to delete and reupload, it counts in the data limit. However, I must say Keatext has always been very open to exceptions to increase limit in the past for these special situations.

author: Katherine F.
pros: Simply put, I love Keatext. Keatext enables me to draw out insights and create concomitant visualizations, and to do so quickly. It is easy to use and intuitive. Beyond the tool itself, the Keatext team goes above and beyond to serve their clients, whether through trainings or quick-turnaround scrape requests. Keatext is not cheap but the value it delivers--both in terms of the tool itself, as well as the time it saves me from writing scrapes and do a completely manual analysis--is more than worth it.
cons: Some workflows and work areas within the tool still feel a little clunky.

review_title: I used Keatext for sentiment analyses on large datasets.
author: Samir T.
pros: Easy to use, good visuals, easy to import data... it was fun to see hypotheses get confirmed or infirmed by the analysis. It was the first time that i tried a software with a sentiment analysis this well presented. I was able to export intelligence from my analyses that were very valuable to me.
cons: Sentiment analysis needs very large amounts of data to be relevant. Even if i liled the output, i was not able to get lots of value with smaller data sets. The precision was sometimes off and i had to manually analyse the data afterwards.

review_title: Keatext is great in theory but needs improvement in practice
author: Rachel H.
pros: Keatext was easy to download and delivers on its promise to categorize large amounts of text data into digestible pieces/themes.
cons: Keatext does not allow you to regroup easily, and doesn't appear to learn new categories after you have previously grouped them manually
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I was approached by Jay so I tried out Keatext mostly to give feedback.
description: Knowing general sentiment of people writing into our support team.
author: Vanessa S.
pros: I thought it was interesting to have a quick and easy way to see positive comments and negative comments as a trend and by terms.
cons: The AI would often wrongly flag things as negative or positive because our users use interesting expressions and speak extremely casually. The software doesn't provide us enough value because it doesn't help our staff answer tickets more quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's simple and effective, good to use for doing overall sentiment analysis of a something simple like a survey. Need to manually bucket entries and create themes is a pain though.
author: Vinayak M.
pros: Simple to use - Steps are easy to understand, no chance of missing out on something important tucked away in a random corner of the interface
cons: Doesn't seem to have too many features - does sentiment analysis of keywords, allows you to bucket and create themes. What would have been amazing if it somehow grouped words together and made themes on it's own.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good idea but execution was lacking
author: Katerina F.
pros: The sorting features were really helpful. I liked being able to group by sentiment.
cons: There was still a TON of manual work required which was extremely time-consuming given all of the data we entered. The software didn't do a good job of grouping words that were essentially the same (e.g. Culture, culture, and cultures would be considered separate words).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A useful tool but needs improvement
description: We were trying to understand customer perception of few cosmetic brands on social media websites and Keatext helped a lot in understanding underlying themes but need to be careful about the verbatim accuracy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software can process and provide verbatim very fast and in a very intuitive GUI
cons: The verbatim is mainly based on keywords used in the sentence such as "Good", "bad" etc. And aren't always accurate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It doesn't completely mitigate the need to read every comment and categorize them myself. The hope was the text analysis tool would mitigate the need to read every comment, but it doesn't quite get there.
author: Shelleen L.
pros: It is another tool to use as we review the survey comments and understand the concerns.
cons: It seems a little convoluted, klunky, lots of steps to get to something useful, but still not what we are looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helpful software but scope to improve even further
author: Divya K.
pros: Grouping feature is quite convenient. Filters is a good feature. Sentiment analysis within grouped words is also helpful
cons: Reaching customer care is a lil bit of a hassle. There is no way to re-classify certain words. No option to create a word cloud. Sentiment analysis does not work for most of the sentences.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dawn K.
pros: It is quick to set up, very easy to use and explain to others. Makes analyzing a large set of reviews quicker.
cons: Better for text analytics - sentiment analysis is not sophisticated enough.

review_title: Tried to find topics in agents comment
author: Olivier B.
pros: Help us to know the emotions of customers and the interface is really clean and userfriendly. Can put more that one database and compare them to each others.
cons: Would like to be able to separate the different data imported. For example, in different projects. Also, some icons are not that visible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with KeaText has been positive. Although there was trouble uploading the reviews initially, the customer service team helped us figure this out, and the analysis ended up proving to be helpful.
author: Justin R.
pros: I like that it can assess connotations within long reviews, rather than looking at each review one at a time.
cons: It is not very intuitive how to use the software. The formatting has to be a very particular way in order for your records to upload properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
